FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Industrial Accident
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: An explosion at the workshop has injured workers and damaged equipment. Production grinds to a halt as the settlement reels.
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.optionDescription: A workshop explosion has left workers injured and equipment in ruins. How do you respond?

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Invest in safety improvements. Rebuild better than before.
Push through. Get production back on line immediately.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Safety Improvements
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The workshop has been rebuilt with improved safety measures. Workers are more confident, and production has actually improved.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Unsafe Conditions
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Workers are forced back to the damaged workshop. Morale plummets as they toil among the wreckage, fearful of another collapse.
